node_image.description:
NodeImage is the kindest/node image to use (e.g. "kindest/node:v1.32.2").
Empty means the default image of the bundled kind version.

extra_mounts.description:
ExtraMounts are additional host directories mounted into the cluster node
container. NIC mounts its auto-created local GitOps repository
automatically; an explicit file:// repository needs a matching entry here.
Other custom mounts are user-managed, and NIC does not recursively
normalize their permissions.

local.KindConfig.description: KindConfig holds optional config for the deployed kind cluster.

local.KindMount.description: KindMount mounts a host directory into the kind node container.

address_pool.description:
AddressPool is the IP range for MetalLB's IPAddressPool. When unset, NIC
derives a pool from the kind Docker network during Deploy.

local.MetalLBConfig.description: MetalLBConfig holds MetalLB-specific settings for the local provider.
